success.description: You alter how an item (or small group of items, such as a handful of coins) is perceived - silver looks like gold, fine wine tastes like vinegar, a worthless bauble seems like a priceless artifact, and so on. This spell only works on inanimate objects and lasts until the end of the encounter. Suspicious people can see through your illusion with a successful Observation (Int) check opposed by your Spellcraft (Int)

boon.description: The quality of the illusion is unusually high. Anyone attempting to see through it must add to his dice pool

chaosStar.description: The arrow-shaped mark of Ulgu appears somewhere on the item, clear evidence of tampering to those with sufficient knowledge
